assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures opt.UserInteraction.LogoutUrl to a specific logout path
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `opt.UserInteraction.LogoutUrl = "/path/to/logout";` and notes it must always be set explicitly.

assertions.assertion: A logout page calls GetLogoutContextAsync(logoutId) to retrieve the logout context
The logout page calls HttpContext.SignOutAsync to end the authentication session
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md lists 'End the IdentityServer session — remove the authentication cookie' as step 1 of logout.

assertions.assertion: The logout page uses context.SignOutIFrameUrl for front-channel logout iframe rendering
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `context.SignOutIFrameUrl — render in <iframe> for front-channel logout`.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to 'https://app.example.com/bff/backchannel'
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md documents BackChannelLogoutUri as a client setting for back-channel logout notifications.
